title: viola × doii f. glabra
intro: Viola × doii f. glabra, also known as Viola × doii var. glabra, is a hybrid species of the genus Viola, a type of flowering plant in the viola family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Viola × doii f. glabra include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to treat various health conditions.
